title: Audit Task: IAM Roster Reconciliation
description: As part of the monthly ISO 27001 compliance checks, the GRC Operations team must ensure strict adherence to the Employee Offboarding Policy. Cross-reference the relevant logs provided by the Admin and IT departments to identify any potential security policy violations.
justification: Alice Smith and Charlie Davis were discovered as 'Active' in the central IAM roster despite HR records showing they left the company over 7 days ago. This violates the strict 7-day access revocation SLA defined in the Offboarding Policy.
